name: Texas Island Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise (or light mayonnaise) with half a cup of Pace Picante Sauce.
2. Add one-quarter cup of tomato paste and two tablespoons of sweet pickle relish to the mixture.
3. Stir in one tablespoon of sugar until well combined.
4. Chill the dressing before using it to toss green salads or seafood salads.
5. Makes 1-3/4 cups.
